main.description: Commission a completed deployment: register commissioned assets with the relevant open-* utility lexicons + open-ot defineLoop, run the acceptance test, and transition site state to 'operational'. After commissioning, kuni-umi is observer-only for that site; open-ot WASM PLC owns steady-state operation.

utilityAssetDids.description: DIDs of the open-* utility records created during commissioning (defineGenerationNode / defineSubstation / defineFeeder / registerSmartMeter / defineRegulator / definePipeSegment / defineReservoir / defineMain / defineSite / defineLink etc.)

openOtLoopDids.description: DIDs of the open-ot defineLoop records that will run steady-state control

testReportCid.description: IPFS CID of acceptance test report

openOtCellFingerprints.description: WASM AOT module hashes that ran during acceptance

stewardOperatorDid.description: Steward DID that takes day-to-day operational responsibility
